prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, landscape orientation
Primary request: Gloomhaven / City of Lions inspired world map for the terrain type dual_continent.
Scene/backdrop: two major dark fantasy continents separated by uneven misty seas and narrow straits, with grim harbor cities, dungeon entrance networks, ancient catacomb roads, demon-infested ruined citadels, frozen north ranges, dark forests, merchant guild routes, mercenary contract zones, cursed marshes, bleak plains and forgotten empire ruins.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated dark tactical fantasy atlas, gloomy overcast lighting, muted parchment and iron-grey sea, inked terrain relief, scenario-board map feeling, dungeon-crawl and mercenary campaign symbols.
Composition/framing: wide landscape map, asymmetric continents of different sizes; the sea separation is diagonal and S-shaped with L-shaped flooded channels, C-shaped bays and jagged straits, not a simple vertical divider; include compass, route lines, dungeon icons, ruin markers and subtle borders without readable text.
Geography constraints: realistic complex coastlines with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, capes, fjords, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, inland seas, marshy estuaries and varied landforms; show multiple climates and biomes including snowy peaks, dark pine forests, swamp deltas, volcanic scarlands, misty coasts, rocky deserts, haunted moors and ruined city belts.
Avoid: mirrored continents, clean vertical split, bright heroic fantasy, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
